chief_complaint: A 58-year-old woman with impaired consciousness and significant abdominal distension. She was found to have diabetic ketoacidosis associated with urinary retention.
history: The patient has schizophrenia and was taking olanzapine. She was transported to the hospital by ambulance due to impaired consciousness.
correct_diagnosis: Olanzapine-induced Diabetic Ketoacidosis with Urinary Retention
differentials: Olanzapine-induced Diabetic Ketoacidosis with Urinary Retention
correct_ranking: Olanzapine-induced Diabetic Ketoacidosis with Urinary Retention
